steps.t: The Angmarim have made camp south of Fellgát. You should find Mullach Cagar.
You have discovered the Angmarim camp of Mullach Cagar. You should search the camp for clues to the Angmarim's purpose here.
You have found a strange staff in Mullach Cagar. You should investigate it more closely.
You have found a mysterious staff in the main tent of Mullach Cagar. You feel it must be a powerful evil artifact. You should destroy the mysterious s…
The staff has completely rebuffed your attack. You should investigate the staff again.
The mysterious staff cannot be destroyed through any means you currently have at your disposal. You have decided you must take the mysterious staff wi…
You now have the mysterious staff in your possession. The nausea and paranoia it causes is slowly increasing. You should return to Hórin and Molkha on…
